description: Create a photorealistic ocean seascape in Blender using the Ocean modifier with a resolution of at least 10 and a spatial size between 20m and 200m. The scene must feature a warm sunset atmosphere with a reddish/orange world background (Red > Blue) and a sun light at a low angle. The active camera should be positioned at a cinematic height between 0.5m and 15m. Render the image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/ocean_render.png and save the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/ocean_scene.blend.
